repos.name: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
repos.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!
repos.descriptionZh: SimpleX - 第一个无需任何类型的用户标识符即可运行的消息传递网络 - 设计为 100% 私密！ iOS、Android 和桌面应用程序📱！

repos.name: google-labs-code/design.md
repos.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
repos.descriptionZh: 用于向编码代理描述视觉标识的格式规范。 DESIGN.md 使代理能够对设计系统有持久的、结构化的理解。

repos.name: commaai/openpilot
repos.description: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.
repos.descriptionZh: openpilot 是一个机器人操作系统。目前，它升级了 300 多辆支持的汽车的驾驶员辅助系统。

repos.name: grafana/grafana
repos.description: The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.
repos.descriptionZh: 开放且可组合的可观测性和数据可视化平台。可视化来自 Prometheus、Loki、Elasticsearch、InfluxDB、Postgres 等多个来源的指标、日志和跟踪。

repos.name: ripienaar/free-for-dev
repos.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
repos.descriptionZh: 具有 devops 和 infradev 感兴趣的免费级别的 SaaS、PaaS 和 IaaS 产品列表

repos.name: opendatalab/MinerU
repos.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
repos.descriptionZh: 将 PDF 和 Office 文档等复杂文档转换为适合您的 Agentic 工作流程的 LLM 就绪 Markdown/JSON。

repos.name: alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
repos.description: 张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

repos.name: mauriceboe/TREK
repos.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
repos.descriptionZh: 自托管旅行/行程规划器，具有实时协作、交互式地图、PWA 支持、SSO、预算、装箱单等功能。

repos.name: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
repos.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
repos.descriptionZh: AI时代的伯克希尔：基于克劳德码的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论+多Agent毛研究。 AI时代的伯克希尔：基于克劳德代码构建的价值投资研究框架。 4种大师方法论+多智能体对抗分析。

repos.name: calesthio/OpenMontage
repos.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repos.descriptionZh: 世界上第一个开源的代理视频制作系统。 12条管道、52种工具、500+座席技能。将您的人工智能编码助手变成一个完整的视频制作工作室。
